name: Wallarm WAF
description: Wallarm API Security Platform REST API for managing WAF nodes, rules, attack detection, vulnerability scanning, and API discovery

actions.name: List Filtering Nodes
actions.description: Retrieve all Wallarm filtering nodes deployed in the environment

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of nodes to return

actions.name: Search Attacks
actions.description: Search and retrieve detected attacks matching specified criteria

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria including time range, attack type, severity, source IP

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of attacks to return

actions.name: Search Hits
actions.description: Search and retrieve individual malicious request hits

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria including attack type, time range, and response codes

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hits to return

actions.name: Search Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Search and retrieve detected API and application vulnerabilities

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria including vulnerability type, severity, and status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of vulnerabilities to return

actions.name: Create WAF Rule
actions.description: Create a new WAF rule for custom traffic handling (block, virtual patch, or modify)

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Rule definition including action (block, virtual_patch, regex), conditions (URI, headers, parameters), and point (request element to match)

actions.name: List WAF Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all custom WAF rules configured in the system

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of rules to return

actions.name: Block IP Address
actions.description: Add an IP address to the denylist for blocking at the WAF level

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: IP rule including ip address, action (block), reason, and expiration time

actions.name: Get API Discovery
actions.description: Retrieve discovered API endpoints and their security risk scores

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter criteria including host, method, path, and risk score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of endpoints to return
